authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. V35 is a named forward-forcing composition of admitted relations, not a relabelled theorem derivation.

composition.candidate_domain: The two unique V2 canonical Protein forms inherited through V34.
composition.boundary_graph: All 2^3 = 8 three-residue contexts and all 2^4 = 16 four-residue transitions, with colour-window overlap and One-residue advance.
composition.context_reconciliation: Exactly one representative per complete boundary context under the unchanged admitted V3 order and deterministic state-tuple tie break.

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: The V2 engine closure, admitted V34 domain and admitted V3 order are source-bound.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: The engine and runtime enumerate all 8 contexts, all 16 quartet transitions and both predecessor modes for every mature context.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: The form contains exactly the closed domain, closed boundary graph, existing V3 order, target-incapable geometry and seal boundary; it contains no beam or new score.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Every boundary context retains exactly one deterministic representative under the registered V3 total order.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Selector input is exactly run_id and sequence; the target is available only after seal verification.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python guards halt on count, overlap, transition, context, source, import, configuration or deterministic-replay drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before runtime promotion and recorded separately after the sealed L76 execution.
